---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an idea for this project
title: '[FEATURE] '
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''

---

## Problem Statement
A clear and concise description of the problem this feature would solve.
_e.g. I'm always frustrated when [...]_

## Proposed Solution
A clear and concise description of what you want to happen.

## Alternatives Considered
A clear and concise description of any alternative solutions or features you've considered, and why you prefer the proposed solution.

## Mockups / Examples
If applicable, add mockups, diagrams, or links to similar features in other products.
<!-- Drag and drop images directly into this text box -->

## Success Criteria
How would we know this feature is working correctly? What does "done" look like?

## Additional Context
Add any other context, links, or references about the feature request here.
